method: human page-context review of all medium/low resolved speakers
notes: SOTA literary quote attribution (Llama-3 / BookNLP+) is domain-mismatched for non-fiction citation prose; keep fail-closed sieves + tiny gold.
Accept only verified utterance speakers; reject sticky citation/storytelling gloss FPs.
